calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Aug-29-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: All Parties sworn prior to commencement of the proceeding.

The following two cases were called together:
1) PED-12-295943 Carol Ann Mauro vs. John Youngblood
2) PED-12-295944 Carol Ann Mauro vs. Derrick Allen

Appearances: Calvin Preuss (Friend of Carol Ann Mauro). Michael Lieberman for and with John Youngblood (Respondent) and Derrick Allen (Respondent).

Mr. Preuss stated that Ms. Mauro is ill and she cannot make it today. He is here to request for a continuance. Mr. Lieberman reported that Ms. Mauro has called his office and said that she cannot make it to court with no reason at all. Mr. Preuss stated that Ms. Mauro called him last night and said that she has joint problems and asked him to come to court today. The Clerk informed the Court that Ms. Mauro called yesterday and requested to appear by phone and the Clerk informed her that is not permitted for an Elder Abuse matter. The Court stated that it is Ms. Mauro's obligation to appear today and that the Court did not receive any doctor's note. Both cases are dismissed without prejudice and taken off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago.
